channel.title: Welcome to my site. on James Akl
channel.description: Recent content in Welcome to my site. on James Akl

item.title: Inverse Problems for DOBC
item.description: PDF | GitHub Full treatment is in the linked PDF and GitHub repo. This page summarizes the main ideas. Project Details The project’s full title is: Noise Extraction in Disturbance Observer-Based Control A Computational Inverse Problems Approach In the context of control theory, a system with inputs $u$ and outputs $y$ may be subject to disturbances on the input, either as unknown external inputs or as model mismatch (inaccurate knowledge of the system).

item.title: A Tour of Robot Mechanics
item.description: INCOMPLETE DRAFT : WORK IN PROGRESS ABSTRACT ~ This article aims to provide a conceptual but rigorous understanding of common robot kinematics and dynamics, presented in a forward and inverse problems setting. After careful reading, the ‘whys’ should become apparent, allowing the ‘hows’ to be better appreciated. Motivation The basic functionality we’d like robots to have, is to move. However, describing a motion from point $\mathsf{A}$ to point $\mathsf{B}$ precisely is not straightforward.

item.title: Defining a Robot
item.description: ABSTRACT ~ In this article we will attempt to define a robot by examining the underlying conditions that distinguish robotic systems. It is impossible to satisfy all opinions with one definition, but being objectively right is not the goal. Instead, the aim is to better understand the nuances surrounding robots. History The word robot has literary origins (specifically, Czech) meaning forced labor. In our context, this essentially implies that a robot is a machine-slave.

item.title: About
item.description: I am a roboticist with a background in engineering, mathematics, and science. My technical interests are summarized with these six keywords: $$ \small\begin{Bmatrix}\mathsf{Robotics,} & \mathsf{Mathematics,} & \mathsf{Research,} \\ \mathsf{Systems,} & \mathsf{Software,} & \mathsf{Science} \end{Bmatrix} $$ Aside from robotics, I am also invested in music, business, and finance. I study people as much as I study robots. So, I enjoy working and learning with ambitious teams and decent individuals. I often think about the socioeconomic and humanities aspects of robots.

item.title: Resume
item.description: You may view my resume in either color theme. View in light theme View in dark theme I value openness and transparency, but also confidentiality. Hence, my educational and professional backgrounds are shared in detail. For private information, please request directly at james-akl@outlook.com.
